description.psitweaks.material_mutator: Performs material mutation using FE and vaporized Psionic Echo
description.psitweaks.program_researcher: Researches program items from materials and power
description.psitweaks.psionic_generator: Consumes the owner's Psi and converts it into FE while linked
description.psitweaks.sculk_eroder: Corrodes stone, dirt, and sand type blocks into Sculk
description.psitweaks.transcendent_energ: An energy cube with 128 times the storage and output of Ultimate Energy Cube
description.psitweaks.transcendent_unive: An energy cable with 128 times the capacity of Ultimate Universal Cable
message.psitweaks.cad_disassembler.unsup: Failed to safely disassemble this TiCCAD.
message.psitweaks.spell_unlock.command.a: Granted all spell unlocks: %s/%s changes, players changed %s/%s
Granted all spell unlocks to %s (%s/%s changed)
No all-spell unlock status was changed (%s player(s), %s spell(s))
Revoked all spell unlocks: %s/%s changes, players changed %s/%s
Revoked all spell unlocks from %s (%s/%s changed)
psi.book.category.psitweaks_machines.des: Machines added by PsiTweaks. They cover processing and research workflows involving Psi, FE, and Mekanism resources.
psi.book.category.psitweaks_spell_pieces: Spell pieces added by PsiTweaks. Many are offensive, industrial, or utility-focused, and some require research depending on the config.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_item.auto_caster: Auto Casters can be equipped in Curios slots and automatically cast spells.$(p)With the Curios Controller, you can change their spell bullets in the same way as psimetal exosuit armor.
The tick model fires every tick. The custom tick model lets you set an interval from 1 to 1200 ticks by using the item.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_item.blank_progr: Used as the base item for program research. Put it into the $(l:psitweaks_machines/program_researcher)$(o)$(item)Program Research Table$(0)$(/l) with the required materials to create a written program.$(p)It can also be crafted with an existing written program item to duplicate that program.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_item.curios_cont: Controls the selected bullet slot of socketable items equipped in Magic Calculation Area slots.$(p)Use it while Auto Casters are equipped as the Curios-side counterpart to the exosuit controller.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_item.flash_charm: A Curios charm that continually removes Blindness and Darkness from the wearer.$(p)It also works while carried in inventory, making it useful in the Deep Dark and against vision-disrupting effects.
$(thing)M.O.V.A.L. Suit$(0) is a stronger suit derived from Psi's exosuit armor. It has high durability and protection, and it can cast installed spell bullets from specific armor events.

The helmet accepts exosuit sensors, the chestplate casts on damage, the leggings cast on tick, and the boots cast on jump.$(p)Each piece grants +10% spell damage, +5 Psi regeneration, and +500 maximum Psi. Psi regeneration and maximum Psi use Psi's own attributes.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_item.philosopher: A reusable catalyst that provides interconversion recipes for metals, diamonds, coal, ender pearls, and other resources.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_item.portable_ca: A handheld CAD Assembler. Use it to open an assembler interface without placing the block, making it easy to adjust CAD parts or loaded spell bullets while away from base.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_item.sorcery_boo: Equips in the Magic Calculation Area slot and increases spell damage by 30%.$(p)It is made from a $(l:components/psitweaks_magicians_brain)$(o)$(item)Magician's Brain$(0)$(/l), making it a combat-focused caster upgrade.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_item.spell_magaz: Stores up to twelve spell bullets and swaps them with the matching slots of your equipped CAD when used.$(p)Use it as a portable loadout carrier when you need to change many bullets at once.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_item.third_eye_d: Equips in the Magic Calculation Area slot and removes Psi's normal spell radius check for the caster.$(p)This lets spells target positions far beyond ordinary CAD range limits, so use it carefully.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_machine.cad_disa: A workbench for disassembling CADs and recovering their parts. Sneak-right-click it with a CAD to break the CAD into its installed components and loaded spell bullets.$(p)Use it when replacing CAD bodies or salvaging parts from old setups.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_machine.material: A machine that performs material mutation with $(item)Psionic Echo Gas$(0) and FE.$(p)It automates mutations that can also be produced by $(l:psitweaks_spell_pieces/trick_material_mutation)$(o)Trick: Material Mutation$(0)$(/l), such as Jade and Hypostasis Gems.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_machine.program_: A powered research table for producing PsiTweaks program items. Put the required ingredients in the input slots and supply FE; completed research outputs the program item.$(p)JEI shows each research recipe's energy cost and time.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_machine.psionic_: A generator that links to its owner and converts that player's Psi into FE while the owner is online.$(p)Use the GUI to enable the link and set the Psi consumed per tick. Generated FE auto-outputs from every side except the front, up to 6400 FE/tick.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_machine.sculk_er: A machine that corrodes stone, dirt, sand, and related block items into Sculk outputs.$(p)Use it when you need Sculk materials without relying on natural spread.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_machine.transcen: An upgraded energy cube with 128 times the storage and output of $(item)Ultimate Energy Cube$(0).$(p)Use it as a buffer for large generators or high-load machine arrays.
An upgraded cable with 128 times the transfer capacity of $(item)Ultimate Universal Cable$(0).$(p)Use it for high-throughput FE lines such as fusion-reactor-class power output.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_material.magicia: Dropped when a Magician villager is killed by $(l:psitweaks_spell_pieces/trick_guillotine)$(o)Trick: Guillotine$(0)$(/l).$(p)Used for the $(l:items/psitweaks_sorcery_booster)$(o)$(item)Sorcery Booster$(0)$(/l) and the Phenomenon Interference Enhancement Unit module.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_material.pellet_: Made by mutating a $(item)Polonium Block$(0) with $(l:psitweaks_spell_pieces/trick_material_mutation)$(o)Trick: Material Mutation$(0)$(/l), or by processing it in the $(l:psitweaks_machines/material_mutator)$(o)Material Mutator$(0)$(/l).$(p)Used for the MekaSuit $(item)Phenomenon Interference Enhancement Unit$(0).
psi.book.page.psitweaks_mekanism_integra: $(thing)PsiTweaks$(0) ties $(thing)Psi$(0) into $(thing)Mekanism$(0) progression. Its integration covers Metallurgic Infusing recipes for Psi materials, MekaSuit modules that improve caster stats, and machines that exchange Psi, FE, and psionic resources.$(p)Use JEI as the exact recipe reference; this entry explains what each group is for.

The $(item)Metallurgic Infuser$(0) can produce core Psi materials with PsiTweaks infuse types. Psigem infusion turns redstone into $(l:components/psidust)$(o)$(item)Psidust$(0)$(/l) and gold into $(item)Psimetal$(0).$(p)Ebony and Ivory infusion can make $(item)Ebony Substance$(0), $(item)Ivory Substance$(0), and their Psimetal variants. Later recipes extend this chain into $(l:components/psitweaks_chaotic_factor)psionic factors$(/l), $(l:components/psitweaks_chaotic_psimetal)$(o)$(item)Chaotic Psimetal$(0)$(/l), $(l:components/psitweaks_psionic_echo)Psionic Echo materials$(/l), and $(l:components/psitweaks_alloy_hypostasis)Hypostasis-tier metal$(/l).

PsiTweaks adds three MekaSuit modules for spellcasters. The $(item)Psyon Supplying Unit$(0) and $(item)Psyon Capacity Unit$(0) install in the MekaSuit body armor and improve Psi regeneration and maximum Psi. These bonuses use Psi's own attributes.$(p)The $(item)Phenomenon Interference Enhancement Unit$(0) installs in the MekaSuit helmet and increases spell damage.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_spell_bullets.0: $(thing)PsiTweaks$(0) adds upgraded tiers above the ordinary $(l:items/spell_bullet)$(o)$(item)Spell Bullet$(0)$(/l): Advanced, Resonant, Sublimated, Awakened, and Transcendent.$(p)Every Psi spell bullet variant has upgraded tiers available.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_spell_bullets.1: Upgrading a spell bullet requires four bullets from the previous tier, making it very expensive.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_spell_bullets.2: Higher tiers greatly improve cost efficiency, making powerful spells easier to cast.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_spellpiece.selec: Gets SpellGram objects around the specified coordinates. It is mainly used by tricks that control placed SpellGram objects.
Gets an entity from the UUID stored in CAD memory.
psi.book.page.psitweaks_spellpiece.trick: Creates a spherical shockwave at the specified coordinates and damages living beings within range. This is an area attack detonated at a chosen location.
Fires a water-blade projectile forward as an early-game offensive trick.
Applies a barrier effect that reduces incoming damage. It reduces damage taken by (level * 4).
Fires a ball of flame forward as an early-game offensive trick.
Breaks the target block with Fortune.
Breaks the target block with Silk Touch.
Permanently freezes the mind of the target mob. Rather than merely dealing damage, this very powerful control trick prevents action.
Removes the target's radiation exposure.
Behaves similarly to Psi's Trick: Die and refunds the Psi cost of spell pieces that were not executed. With high-frequency casting, the client-side Psi display may temporarily desync.
Removes effects from the target entity. This is the general-purpose dispel that does not distinguish between beneficial and harmful effects.
Removes only beneficial effects from the target entity. It is suited for stripping enhancements from hostile targets.
Removes non-beneficial effects from the target entity. Use it when you want to cleanse harmful effects while leaving allied buffs intact.
Creates an explosion that deals damage without destroying blocks. Be careful: dropped items and similar entities can still be erased.
Places a fire SpellGram Circle that continuously deals fire damage to living beings inside it. Once placed, the circle remains for 60 seconds.
Gives the target an effect that enables creative flight.
Deals powerful slash damage to the target and makes it drop a head when killed. This is a single-target offensive trick.
Applies a hardening effect that limits large incoming damage to a fixed value. Maximum damage taken is capped at (level - 2).
Places an ice SpellGram Circle that continuously deals freezing damage to living beings inside it. Like Fire Circle, it is suited for area control.
Acts on the target block as if right-clicked with the item in the caster's off hand.
Breaks specific blocks and transmutes them into other items. The Material Mutator can perform this process using power and Vaporized Psionic Echo.
Cuts living beings along a plane defined by three points. It is a high-power area attack trick.
Applies an effect that evades attacks by chance. It evades attacks with a (62.5 + 7.5 * level)% chance.
Fires a high-power heat ray using ultrasonic vibration. It is a powerful offensive trick.
Applies a radiation protection effect to the target, protecting them from radiation.
Applies Mekanism radiation exposure to the target.
Sets the follow target entity of a SpellGram object.
Stores the target entity's UUID in CAD memory.
Supplies FE to the target block. When CAD Efficiency is 100, it supplies 20 FE per Psi.
Infusion-converts Echo Shards into Psionic Echo.
Multiplies the target block's tick progression by (2 ^ power). The upper limit is 512x speed.
psitweaks.spellpiece.selector_nearby_spe: Retrieve SpellGram objects around the specified position
psitweaks.spellpiece.selector_stored_ent: Retrieve entities from the UUID stored in the CAD memory
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_active_air_mi: Deals magic damage to entities inside a spherical area around the target position
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_aqua_cutter.d: Launches a water blade projectile that damages on hit
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_blaze_ball.de: Launches a fireball forward that deals fire damage on hit
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_break_fortune: Break a block with Fortune applied
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_break_silk.de: Break a block with Silk Touch applied
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_cocytus.desc: Permanently freeze the target mob's mind
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_cure_radiatio: Removes radiation exposure from the target
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_die_flex.desc: Stops execution when given a number whose absolute value is less than 1, and refunds Psi cost for skipped pieces. When used in spells that cast every tick, client-side Psi display may temporarily desync.
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_dispel_benefi: Remove beneficial effects from target entity
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_dispel_non_be: Remove non beneficial effects from target entity
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_explode_no_de: Cause an explosion that does not destroy blocks
Places a flare Spell Gram Circle that repeatedly deals fire damage around it
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_guillotine.de: Deals a heavy slash to the target and drops a head on kill
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_hardening.des: When taking heavy damage, reduce it to a certain value
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_ice_circle.de: Places an ice Spell Gram Circle that repeatedly deals freeze damage around it
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_interact_bloc: Right-click with the off-hand item on the target block
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_material_muta: Acts on a specific block, alters its material structure, and transmutes it into a different substance.
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_molecular_div: divide the living creatures within the area
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_parade.desc: Avoid damage with a certain probability
Vibrates ultrasonic waves to emit heat rays
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_radiation_fil: Applies a radiation filter effect to the target
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_radiation_inj: Applies radiation exposure to the target
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_set_spellgram: Sets the follow target entity for a SpellGram object
Store the entity's UUID in the CAD memory
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_supply_fe.des: Supplies FE to blocks. Direction can be specified.
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_supreme_infus: Infuse Echo Shards into Psionic Echoes
psitweaks.spellpiece.trick_time_accelera: Accelerates the time of the target block
